#AncestryDNA raw data download
#Synthetic fixture for tests/backend/test_validate_sex_thresholds.py — manual_review case.
#NEVER copied from a real export; every genotype is hand-fabricated to exercise
#Plan §9.4 manual-review branch: candidate XY on chrX zygosity, chrY non-no-call
#rate between the default PAR-noise (0.10) and XY-confirm (0.30) thresholds.
# AncestryDNA array version: V2.0
